decision: Expose repo-governance as a named Nix package, app, reusable check helper, governance self-check, and feat-consumer example so feature repos can consume governance with one flake input, one helper call, and one repo snapshot contract.
acceptanceGates: nix run .#repo-governance succeeds against governance self contract
feat consumer example check succeeds with --override-input governance .
git diff --exit-code proves CI does not mutate checkout
knownStacking: This PR is stacked on governance#5 because the Nix package wraps the repo-governance implementation introduced there. After governance#5 and governance#6 merge, retarget or rebase this PR onto main.
boundary: Nix package distribution surface only; adrs remains rule authority and governance remains non-authority projection/check implementation.
